device_name: HYDROS Robotic System (HY1000); HYDROS Handpiece (HH1000); HYDROS TRUS Probe (HU1000)
intended_use: The HYDROS Robotic System is indicated for the resection and removal of prostate tissue in males suffering from lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS) due to benign prostatic hyperplasia.
intended_use_full: The HYDROS Robotic System is indicated for the resection and removal of prostate tissue in males suffering from lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS) due to benign prostatic hyperplasia.
target_condition: Benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) with lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS)
other_metrics: Non-clinical bench tests completed per applicable standards including System Verification (FDA Guidance for BPH devices), Usability (IEC 62366-1:2015, ANSI/AAMI HE75:2009), Electromagnetic Compatibility (IEC 60601-1-2:2020), Basic Safety (IEC 60601 series), Wireless (AAMI TIR69:2017), Sterilization (EN ISO 11135:2014), Biocompatibility (ISO 10993 series), and Packaging/Transit (ISTA 3B:2017). All tests reported as 'Pass'. TRUS Probe validated for 71 reprocessing cycles (vs. 25 in predicate). Handpiece shelf life extended to 24 months (vs. 6 months in predicate). FirstAssist AI feature has updated AI model for landmark identification.
